title: myrsine lancifolia
intro: Myrsine lancifolia, also known as the Japanese myrsine or kanbō, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrsinaceae. It is a shrub native to East Asia, valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of M. lancifolia include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and wounds. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal preparations like infusions, decoctions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
